message:
test: Add comprehensive tests for curate, extractBulletReasoning, and validate

NEW TEST FILES:

1. test/curate.test.ts (70 lines)
   Tests for curatePlaybook function focusing on:
   - Decay handling: Verifies configured decay half-life applies to inverted
     anti-patterns during curation
   - Creates test playbook with harmful rule (5 harmful events)
   - Validates that curation respects decay configuration

2. test/extract-bullet-reasoning.test.ts (126 lines)
   Comprehensive tests for extractBulletReasoning utility:
   - Returns explicit reasoning when set
   - Returns key evidence from derivedFrom.keyEvidence
   - Joins multiple evidence items with semicolon
   - Falls back to session metadata (agent + date)
   - Uses derivedFrom.extractedBy when sourceAgents unavailable
   - Returns "No reasoning available" for empty bullet
   - Truncates long reasoning to 200 chars (with word/sentence boundaries)
   - Handles edge cases: null values, empty strings, whitespace-only

3. test/validate.test.ts (39 lines)
   Tests for normalizeValidatorVerdict helper:
   - Maps REFINE verdict to ACCEPT_WITH_CAUTION
   - Applies 0.8 confidence multiplier for cautionary accepts
   - Preserves REJECT as invalid without confidence change
   - Preserves ACCEPT as valid without changes

TYPES DECLARATION FILE (types.d.ts):
- Triple-slash references for Bun, Node, and diff-match-patch types
- Enables TypeScript to resolve type definitions correctly

WHY:
These tests validate critical business logic:
- Curation decay ensures harmful rules lose influence over time
- Reasoning extraction provides context for rule provenance
- Validator verdict normalization ensures consistent handling of LLM responses

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
